recent_announcements.summary: One 97 Communications Limited has informed the Exchange that the Board of Directors at its meeting held on July 20, 2026,  ⁠after evaluating the proposal from the perspective of long-term shareholder value and due deliberation, the Board was of the view that the Company should continue to focus on further compounding growth and profitability for shareholder value creation. Accordingly, the Board decided not to proceed with the said proposal at this time. |SUBJECT: Bonus
